label: Scale Pak
blurb: Creative Ops, Agency & Media Automation. Content velocity and agency margin expansion.

skills.label: Watermark Applier And Renderer
skills.method: Batch processes 100 images to apply agency watermarks, crop to 4 ratios, and compress for web.

skills.label: Creative Brief Generator
skills.method: Turns a messy 30-message client Slack thread into a structured 1-page PDF brief for the design team.

skills.label: Podcast Show Notes Writer
skills.method: Takes raw audio transcript, generates timestamps, a viral summary, and guest social links.
trigger_examples: turns a 1-hour post-production chore into a 1-minute task

skills.label: Seo Content Gap Analyzer
skills.method: Compares your blog to top 3 competitors, generates a list of missing H2 headers and keywords.

skills.label: Brand Guideline Enforcer
skills.method: Scans Figma files to ensure exact hex codes, padding, and font weights match the corporate design system.

skills.label: Video B Roll Sourcer
skills.method: Reads a script/timeline, searches Getty/Shutterstock APIs, returns 5 watermarked clip options perfectly timed.
trigger_examples: saves video editors hours of stock hunting

skills.label: Influencer Roi Calculator
skills.method: Scrapes promo code usage from Shopify and correlates it with affiliate payout tiers.

skills.label: Localization Subtitle Adjuster
skills.method: Adjusts translated SRT files so text fits on screen without forcing the viewer to read impossibly fast.

skills.label: Ad Compliance Checker
skills.method: Checks pharma/finance ad copy against FDA/SEC required disclaimer rules before publishing.
trigger_examples: prevents catastrophic regulatory fines for agencies
